title: Provider(type: wireguard).spec.configuration
description: Shape-only fragment (docs/planning/08 E5, docs/adr/023). peerNetwork/peerPublicKey/peerEndpoint/address/allowedIPs are unconditionally required (no fallback — parseConfig's identical check moves here). privateKeySecretRef's spec.secretRefs-membership-or-nonempty-secretRefs fallback remains a SpecValidator cross-field rule.
